description:
Deep antagonistic quality review of `hx-side-nav` (T2-37). 3/6 libraries — collapsible left navigation.

Review `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-side-nav/`.

**Audit areas:**
1. TypeScript — strict, collapsed/expanded state, nav item typing, active item indication, group/section typing
2. Accessibility — `<nav aria-label="...">` landmark, current page has `aria-current="page"`, collapse toggle has `aria-expanded`, icons have labels when nav is collapsed (tooltip or aria-label), keyboard nav (Tab through links), axe-core pass
3. Tests — expand/collapse, active item, keyboard nav, icon-only collapsed mode, responsive behavior
4. Storybook — expanded/collapsed, with icons, grouped items, active states, responsive
5. CSS — smooth collapse animation, `--hx-*` tokens, fixed/sticky variants, CSS parts
6. Performance — bundle < 5KB
7. Drupal — Twig-renderable, server-side active state

**Output:** Write findings to `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-side-nav/AUDIT.md` with severity (P0/P1/P2). DO NOT fix — document only. Commit AUDIT.md as your PR.
title: AUDIT: hx-side-nav — T2-37 antagonistic quality review
